name: UC KART
short_description: UC KART is a racing game. There is HP in the car. When HP reaches 0, the game is over. Equipped with a color edit function, you can change the color of the car and driver. In single play, you will play against the CPU. It supports online play, and you can play against other players online.
detailed_description:
UC KART is a racing game for 1 to 4 players. There is HP in the car. When HP reaches zero, the game is over.

Equipped with color edit function

You can change the color of the car and the driver.

Single play support

You can play against the CPU.

Online play support

You can play against other players online.

Controls

【Keyboard】
UP:w,↑
DOWN:s,↓
LEFT:a,←
RIGHT:d,→
ACCEL:j,v
BRAKE&BACK:k,c
PAUSE:Escape

【PS4 Controller】
UP:Left Stick
DOWN:Left Stick
LEFT:Left Stick
RIGHT:Left Stick
ACCEL:〇
BRAKE&BACK:×
PAUSE:option

【XBox Controller】
UP:Left Stick
DOWN:Left Stick
LEFT:Left Stick
RIGHT:Left Stick
ACCEL:B
BRAKE&BACK:A
PAUSE:menu
